🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG without losing quality

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

JPG is a lossy format, so a careless converter can soften details or add artifacts. This page encodes at high quality (92%) and preserves the full resolution of your HEIC photo, so the JPG looks visually identical at normal viewing sizes. If you need a perfectly lossless result, convert to PNG instead.

How to convert

  1. Drop your HEIC photo into the box.
  2. We keep full resolution and encode at high JPG quality.
  3. Download the JPG — compare it side by side with the original.

FAQ

Is JPG ever truly lossless?

No, JPG always discards some data. For a lossless copy choose HEIC to PNG instead, at the cost of a larger file.

Related converters

HEIC to JPGHEIC to PNGPNG to JPGWEBP to JPG
